name: Broccoli and Noodles Parmesan
recipeIngredient: 1 can Campbell's Soup (10-3/4 Condensed Cream of Mushroom)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut broccoli into bite-size pieces.
2. In a covered 4-quart saucepan over medium heat, cook broccoli in boiling water for 6 minutes or until tender. Drain in a colander.
3. In the same saucepan over medium heat, melt butter and cook onion and garlic until onion is tender, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in soup and basil; mix well.
5. Add cheeses, stirring until melted.
6. Stir in sour cream, broccoli, and cooked noodles.
7. Pour into a 2-quart casserole.
8. Cover and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until bubbly.
